title: Fix access code redemption TOCTOU race condition
description: Fix Time-Of-Check-Time-Of-Use race condition in access code redemption endpoint that allows over-redemption beyond maxUses limit and duplicate entitlements. Replace sequential read-check-write flow with atomic MongoDB operations using $inc and $lt to ensure only one concurrent redemption succeeds. Add unique compound index on (user, course) to prevent entitlement duplication.
questions: Should concurrent redemption requests beyond maxUses return 409 Conflict, or should we implement a queue/retry pattern?
How should we handle rollback of duplicate entitlements that may already exist from the race condition?
Do existing access codes need migration to add the unique compound index, or can we apply it prospectively?
